prompt:
A photorealistic glamorous editorial photograph set in the private nightclub lounge of a luxury villa, deep blue and magenta neon lighting, reflective floors, smoky cinematic atmosphere, late-night party vibe. Five stunningly beautiful women, each in a different elegant modern evening look, posed confidently across the space, magazine-cover quality.

Woman 1 (Chinese): unmistakably Chinese, classic oriental beauty with almond eyes, fair porcelain skin, long straight jet-black hair with blunt bangs, elegant restrained makeup, graceful refined aura; modern dark emerald sequined slip dress, leaning against the neon-lit bar with a cocktail, alluring confident gaze.

Woman 2 (Japanese): unmistakably Japanese, soft round face, naturally fair skin, shoulder-length wavy brown hair with airy fringe, delicate soft makeup with pink blush, gentle demure aura; silver metallic mini dress, seated elegantly on a velvet sofa, poised and graceful.

Woman 3 (Korean): unmistakably Korean, clean V-line face, glass-skin glowing complexion, glossy straight dark-brown hair with see-through bangs, trendy K-beauty makeup with gradient lips and straight brows, chic modern aura; black cut-out dress, dancing with a playful confident smile under the neon glow.

Woman 4 (American): tall athletic statuesque figure, blonde wavy hair, blue eyes, glamorous gold fringe dress, standing tall with radiant powerful presence, magenta light tracing her silhouette.

Woman 5 (African): striking radiant beauty, deep rich skin tone, sculpted high cheekbones, natural voluminous curls, bold red high-slit gown, posing regally on a lit platform, commanding elegant presence.

All women are gorgeous, elegant and confident, in modern high-fashion looks, with clearly distinct ethnic features and styling, nightlife editorial, diverse beauty, luxurious neon party atmosphere. Shot on a medium format camera, 50mm lens, cinematic neon lighting, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, professional color grading. 16:9 aspect ratio.
